summary: Comprehensive frontend regression of the Pritpal Singh portfolio redesign at the preview URL. All 22 spec requirements verified working. Hero merges name + role + tagline + profile w/ green Open-to-Work badge + orange Download Resume CTA (btn-orbit) + Copy Email CTA. Old elements (live-clock, status-bubble, AboutSection, CertificationsSection on home) confirmed REMOVED. Tagline correctly highlights growth, AI, storytelling, experiments, B2B SaaS, Figma via .kw spans (plus 'product' as bonus). ScrollNudge present at bottom-center, opacity 1 at scrollY=0 and fades to 0 by scrollY=400 (via framer useTransform). Sidebar shows home/playground/experience/certifications/writing/divider/linkedin in that order, NO nav-contact. MobileNav at 375px shows linkedin icon, no contact icon. ClickPop verified: clicking anywhere appends .click-pop and .click-pop-dot elements to body (observed 7 elements right after click) and removes them within ~750ms. ContactSection retains only linkedin/resume/email social pills; github/twitter/medium confirmed absent. CMD+K palette opens with cmdk-overlay, contains cmdk-linkedin and cmdk-cert actions, NO contact action. Writing detail (/writing/boring-half-of-growth) renders writing-detail, writing-back, writing-next, writing-p-0, hero cover, and reading-progress bar. Playground detail (/playground/n8n-growth-workflows) renders playground-detail, playground-back, playground-next, playground-section-0, hero image, alternating layout, gallery. Project routes (/projects/:slug) still work. Resume PDF /assets/Pritpal_Singh_Resume.pdf returns HTTP 200 (90946 bytes via curl). Copy Email writes to clipboard and toggles button label to 'Copied' when permissions granted. Zero console errors on /, /writing/*, /playground/*, /projects/*. No horizontal overflow at 1920/768/375. Background uses paper-bg with warm orange glow on top of page only — no scroll-following overlay.
action_items: Informational: the highlight() KEYWORDS list still contains 'product', 'products', 'users', 'metrics', 'strategy', 'retention', '0→1', 'marketplaces', 'monetisation', etc. The spec asked highlights to include 'growth, AI, storytelling, experiments, B2B SaaS, Figma' — those are all included, but additional words also highlight in the tagline (e.g. 'product' is highlighted). Not a bug, but main agent may want to narrow KEYWORDS if only the 6 spec keywords should glow.
Informational: Hero profile image is still the hardcoded Unsplash placeholder URL. Confirm if a real photo should replace it.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx IntersectionObserver SECTIONS list does not include 'projects' or 'contact' — only home/playground/experience/writing update the active sidebar dot. 'certifications' is correctly excluded (external link). Consider adding 'projects' for nav highlight consistency.

ClickPop ignores clicks on INPUT/TEXTAREA but does NOT ignore clicks on BUTTON/A. This means the pop visual + sound fires on every CTA click, command-palette open, social pill click, etc. This is intentional per spec ('clicking anywhere'), but the WebAudio context resume happens on every click which is fine. No leak observed.
ScrollNudge has pointer-events-none which is correct so it never blocks clicks beneath it.
WritingDetail/PlaygroundDetail use writing.findIndex/playground.findIndex twice (once for piece lookup, once for next). Minor — could be a single pass.
CommandPalette has no contact entry — verified. Items: home, projects, playground, writing, resume, cert, linkedin.

Tagline regex uses \b boundaries; works for English keywords but 'B2B SaaS' contains a space — works because the regex matches the whole phrase. Verified all 6 spec keywords (growth, AI, storytelling, experiments, B2B SaaS, Figma) highlight correctly.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: None — content driven by local JSON
context_for_next_testing_agent: All redesign requirements pass on preview URL. Notes for re-testing: (1) Clipboard test in headless requires await context.grant_permissions(['clipboard-read','clipboard-write']) BEFORE clicking cta-copy-email — without it the silent try/catch in Hero.jsx swallows the error and the button label stays the email instead of 'Copied'. (2) The resume PDF returns 403 to plain urllib/python-requests due to preview gateway anti-bot heuristics; use curl with -A header or verify via the browser (it returns 200, 90946 bytes). (3) CMD+K palette uses data-testid='cmdk-overlay' and cmdk-{id} for items — query these directly. (4) ClickPop adds .click-pop and .click-pop-dot to document.body; check counts on document.querySelectorAll('.click-pop').length + .click-pop-dot.length within 200ms of click, then again after 1s for cleanup.
rca of the issue: No issues found. The three apparent test failures in the first run were tooling artifacts: urllib hit the preview gateway anti-bot (resume actually 200 via curl/browser), Playwright headless blocked clipboard until permissions were granted (button works after grant), and my initial palette text selector did not include [data-testid=cmdk-overlay] (re-test with correct selector showed linkedin present and contact absent).
